blogs.title: I Started a Blog!
blogs.content:
Hi guys, I am Kayra. Today I start writing blogs, so welcome to my blog.

First of all, I would love to start to tell what I am doing here. In this blog website, I am gonna write about my experiences while I explore or learn new things.

Purpose of the blog, I mean what’s my expectations from that blog, make it permanent and clear when I learn or explore new things. With that, share you what I faced during the project or in the journey.

But I need to tell you, I am just a student, so please don’t expect too much :)))

I hope we will have fun together, improve ourselves, and with that learn new stuff. See you as soon as possible.

First Code

print("Hello World")
